name: proc_creation_win_apt_lazarus_group_activity
raw_query: any where (process.command_line like~ ("*reg.exe save hklm\\sam %temp%\\~reg_sam.save*", "*1q2w3e4r@#$@#$@#$*", "* -hp1q2w3e4 *", "*.dat data03 10000 -p *")) or (process.command_line:"*netstat -aon | find *" and process.command_line:"*ESTA*" and process.command_line:"* > %temp%\\~*") or (process.command_line:"*.255 10 C:\\ProgramData\\IBM\\*" and process.command_line:"*.DAT*") or ((process.command_line:"* /c *" and process.command_line:"* -p 0x*") and (process.command_line like~ ("*C:\\ProgramData\\*", "*C:\\RECYCLER\\*"))) or ((process.command_line:"*rundll32 *" and process.command_line:"*C:\\ProgramData\\*") and (process.command_line like~ ("*.bin,*", "*.tmp,*", "*.dat,*", "*.io,*", "*.ini,*", "*.db,*")))
